message: It's Saturday... School lets out early today.
Despite that, I couldn't stop myself from skipping class after first period.
Before, I never even considered skipping...
I went up the stairs as the bell for second period rang.
I went up the stairs and left that place where I didn't belong behind me. Up and up.
I was expecting him to be there.
His beautiful hair fluttered in the wind.
Long, straight, carefully combed hair.
Pretty eyes...
Even God himself would be enthralled by that sight.
That's why...

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, g-good morning."

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? Who are you?"
He had a smile on his face as he asked me that.

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-Why can't you remember it? I'm Takashima Zakuro, from the class next to yours."

name: Mamiya
message: "Takashima... Zakuro... Oh, you skipped class yesterday. Wait, what are you doing right now?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Skipping class."

name: Mamiya
message: "Really?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes."
I sat down next to him.
Maybe a little too close...

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, here."
I gave him the book I had borrowed.

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, Rodari. Did you like it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah, it was really interesting."

name: Mamiya
message: "Then I'm glad I lent it to you."

name: Zakuro
message: "What country is the author from?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Which do you think? There are hints in the story if you think about the places and buildings that show up... Can you remember?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Uh, there were lots of old Roman ruins in the story..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Largo di Torre Argentina."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah, and there was also... Venice, the Garibaldi Bridge, and the Leaning Tower of Pisa. Does that mean he's from Italy?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Exactly. Gianni Rodari was a writer of children's stories in Italy."

name: Zakuro
message: "You know a lot about writers, don't you?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Not at all. It's just easy to remember the authors you like, don't you think?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah..."

name: Zakuro
message: "What are you reading today?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, nothing new... It's the same book as yesterday."

name: Zakuro
message: "The same book as yesterday?"

name: Zakuro
message: "The cover is different... and it's not even the same size."

name: Mamiya
message: "I was just curious, so I tried it."

name: Zakuro
message: "Curious about what?"
There were unfamiliar words printed in book he held up in front of me.
Beside him he had a notebook and...

name: Zakuro
message: "A French dictionary... F-French?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, well... I'm probably not understanding much of it. I was just curious."

name: Zakuro
message: "Mamiya-kun, can you read French?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Of course not. I just like to study it in my free time once in a while."

name: Zakuro
message: "But there are translations in your notebook..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, that's just because I've read it so many times before. With a dictionary, I can at least translate a few of the lines."

name: Mamiya
message: "But really, it's not a big deal."
He hid the book away.

name: Zakuro
message: "Cyrano... de..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Cyrano de Bergerac?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah... Do you think I could read it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Can you read French?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, that's not what I mean. The one you were reading before."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, like I said, anyone who's graduated from middle school could read that. Have you finished middle school?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Of course I have!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Do you want to read it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Okay, then... Here."
He gave me the book from yesterday.

name: Zakuro
message: "Cyrano de Bergerac..."

name: Mamiya
message: "It's an excellent, flowing translation."

name: Zakuro
message: "Thank you."

name: Mamiya
message: "So that book caught your eye?"
Well, it's the book you were reading so intently...
Though I could never say that.

name: Zakuro
message: "It sounded really interesting when I heard you talk about it."

name: Mamiya
message: "It really is a good book."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah..."

name: Zakuro
message: "You've read this book quite a few times, then."

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, it's a play, so it's not as long as it looks. I just ended up reading it over a few times."

name: Zakuro
message: "Not because you particularly like it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I wonder... I'm not sure, but there definitely aren't many other books that have made me want to read the original text."

name: Zakuro
message: "Have you done that for other books?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Just a few pages. I always give up after a while."

name: Mamiya
message: "I guess, in a way... I do really like it, since I've filled up a couple notebooks translating it as I read."

name: Zakuro
message: "I see..."
He said it was a story about an ugly man... Why was Mamiya-kun so captivated by this play?
And he said it was about unrequited true love...
Does that mean...

name: Zakuro
message: "Mamiya-kun... Have you ever experienced unrequited love?"

name: Mamiya
message: "...Where did that come from?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, nevermind... I'm sorry."

name: Mamiya
message: "You mean maybe that's why I like this book?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, no... Uh..."
Maybe I was too straightforward... I must seem stupid...
Does he like a book about unrequited love because he's experienced it... That was a stupid question.
My face must have been beet red. Mamiya-kun looked at me and laughed... and then...

name: Mamiya
message: "I'm still human, you know? Of course I've experienced unrequited love."

name: Mamiya
message: "A one-sided love that never reaches the object of one's affections... I've experienced that before."
I kind of...
Felt a little... jealous.

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, let's drop that subject. It's kind of embarrassing."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, sure... I'm sorry."
Embarrassing... It really was embarrassing.

name: Mamiya
message: "The way you said that makes me wonder... Are you interested in it because of your own experiences with unrequited love?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Y-Yes!"
Wait, why did I answer that question? Am I stupid?

name: Mamiya
message: "I see. That must be tough... though it can be fun in its own way."
He can probably see straight through me.
Jeez, it's like...
Just... what is going on?
Today I borrowed another book from Mamiya-kun.
But today, unlike yesterday, it's one of Mamiya-kun's favorite plays.

name: Zakuro
message: "Maybe I can get a little closer to Mamiya-kun..."
Maybe not.
I can read it during the next class.
The Classical Literature teacher does nothing but write on the blackboard and talk in a monotone.
He won't even notice me reading in his class.

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah... It's interesting."
It didn't seem like an old book at all.
He said it was criticized for being old and dated when it was first published... and yet reading it after all these years, it didn't seem old at all.
The protagonist, Cyrano, was kind of like Mamiya-kun.
Though Mamiya-kun isn't ugly like Cyrano. He seems more like the beautiful man in the story, Christian (though I don't know what Christian would have actually looked like, since it's just text).
Cyrano is very ugly, but also intelligent and reliable.
Mamiya-kun is intelligent and reliable, but also very handsome.

name: Zakuro
message: "His vocabulary is really good."
That could be said of both Cyrano and Mamiya-kun.

name: Zakuro
message: "The beautiful heroine, Roxanne, was captivated by Cyrano's voice, but..."
Listening to an intelligent person speak definitely is captivating...
That happens to me when I listen to Mamiya-kun.
But...

name: Mamiya
message: "It's just... it bugged me how the heroine in this manga wasn't a virgin, so I was gonna burn it and upload the video."
Sometimes he's like that.
When he talks like that, he just seems pitiful.
His voice is so beautiful, but what he's saying...
I can't even think of that as the same person.

name: Zakuro
message: "Why would Mamiya-kun say something crude like that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "He burnt it because the girl wasn't a virgin... That's terrible."
That was when we first met.
Which means... maybe he was trying to deceive me...
Maybe he was intentionally acting like that...
Oh, actually...

name: Zakuro
message: "Come! Take it, and change..."

name: Zakuro
message: "That was a line in Cyrano de Bergerac."

name: Zakuro
message: "It was a line from the scene where Cyrano suggests that he could write love letters for Christian to send to Roxanne."
The protagonist, Cyrano... He was a genius, but also incredibly ugly.
He fell in love with a beautiful, intelligent woman named Roxanne.
But a beautiful woman would never fall in love with such a hideous man.
A love that could never be requited...
That's what he thought.
He met a man named Christian, whose only virtue was that he was incredibly handsome.
He too had fallen in love with Roxanne, but a brilliant woman like Roxanne would never fall in love with a constantly tongue-tied man like him just because he was handsome.
Then Cyrano came up with a plan.
Christian would profess his love with the words that Cyrano had written.
When he suggested it to Christian, this is what he said:

name: Zakuro
message: "Come! Take it, and change..."
Then... when Mamiya-kun acted like that...
Maybe it wasn't really him...
Maybe he was telling me, 'Take it!'...

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahahahaha... Reality could never be that sweet."
It couldn't be... After that, he said, "feigned love-words into true." That would make the strange, pitiful Mamiya-kun the real one.

name: Zakuro
message: "That wouldn't be good at all."
Mamiya-kun's favorite play, Cyrano de Bergerac...
A story about an ugly genius and a beautiful idiot working together to seduce a woman...
Cyrano has the soul and Christian has the body...
By the way, Christian was the kind of man who got so flustered in front of the woman he loved that he could barely even speak.
If you think about it like that, the intelligent Christian with Cyrano's soul, and the stupid Christian without it...
It's just like the intelligent Mamiya-kun and the strange one.
Huh?
Could there be... two of him?
Maybe there's a stupid yet handsome Mamiya-kun and an ugly but smart Mamiya-kun.

name: Zakuro
message: "That's impossible, huh..."
In Cyrano de Bergerac, Christian's voice changed when Cyrano talked.
Of course, it was like someone else was dubbed in over his voice.
But Mamiya-kun's voice didn't change.
They both sounded like Mamiya-kun.
Their voices were the same, but the words they used were so different...
Completely different.

name: Zakuro
message: "Though, I've..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Been thinking about Mamiya-kun all day..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahahahaha..."
It has to be love.
This is unrequited love.
Yep.
Yeah... That's right.
Totally unrequited love...
One-sided...

name: Zakuro
message: "Because..."
We could never be together.
Mamiya-kun, with his handsome face and his vast intellect, is more like Roxanne than Christian or Cyrano.

name: Zakuro
message: "Then I'm..."
I'm not smart or beautiful...
I'm neither Christian nor Cyrano... I'm no one.
That's why...

name: Zakuro
message: "My love could never be requited."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's right."
Everyone looks at me with disgust.
Until a few months ago, I was bullied.
Recently, the bullying has stopped, though. I don't understand why.
They bullied me so much, then one day, it suddenly stopped. That's why I'm always on edge.
I'm always worried that I'll be plunged back into that hell.
I'm always cautious not to offend anyone.
Trying not to annoy anyone... Trying to fit in...
That's all I can think about.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahaha... I'm like a stalker..."
When I saw Mamiya-kun reading alone on the rooftop... I took a picture.

name: Zakuro
message: "He would probably hate me if he found it."
Why is he so cool when he's up there? He's completely different from any other time I see him.

name: Zakuro
message: "Why is he so smart and cool? Ahahaha."
I didn't even realize until a moment later that I was rolling around in bed, unconsciously clutching his picture to my chest.

name: Zakuro
message: "This really makes me seem like a stalker, but tomorrow's Sunday... It should be fine."
That excuse doesn't really make sense.
I know that.
But I won't be able to see Mamiya-kun tomorrow.
Though I do have the book he lent me.

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"
That's right... This is Mamiya-kun's book.
It's something he touched...

name: Zakuro
message: "W-Whoa!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Next time I take a bath... I won't wash this hand."
Though doing that might just confirm me as a stalker.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahahaha. That's a joke. I just met him. There's no way I could fall in love that quickly."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah, he's just really interesting, that's all."

name: Zakuro
message: "There's no way I could become a normal girl. Only a normal girl could fall in love like that."
That's right...
Nothing good has happened in the past when I started to feel like that about someone.
I should just stay in my room and keep my feelings to myself.
I'll just pretend it's a joke... I'll just keep it to myself... That's good enough for me.
